html:
KENYA RED CROSS SOCIETY

Internship Offer Letter

Offer Number {{ doc.name }}
Date {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.offer_date) }}
Applicant {{ doc.applicant_name }}
Department {{ doc.department }}
Supervisor {{ doc.supervisor }}
Start Date {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.start_date) }}
End Date {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.end_date) }}
Duration {{ doc.duration }}

Offer

Dear {{ doc.applicant_name }}, Congratulations! Following your successful interview, we are pleased to offer you an internship position with the Kenya Red Cross Society. You are expected to report on the internship start date shown above.

Terms and Conditions

  • Observe Kenya Red Cross Society policies.
  • Maintain confidentiality.
  • Report to your assigned supervisor.
  • Adhere to working hours.
  • Complete assigned tasks professionally.
__________________________ HR Officer


__________________________ Organization Stamp
Kenya Red Cross Society
name: Internship Offer Letter

html:
Interview Invitation

Dear {{ frappe.db.get_value('Internship Application', doc.application, 'applicant_name') or doc.application }},

You are invited for an interview with the Kenya Red Cross Society.

Vacancy{{ doc.vacancy }}
Date{{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.interview_date) }}
Time{{ doc.interview_time }}
Venue{{ doc.venue or '' }}
Meeting Link{{ doc.meeting_link or '' }}
Panel{% set panels = [] %}{% for row in doc.interview_panel %}{% set _ = panels.append(row.panel_member) %}{% endfor %}{{ panels | join(', ') }}

For questions, please contact HR.
name: Interview Invitation

html:
Internship Acceptance

Applicant{{ frappe.db.get_value('Internship Application', doc.applicant, 'applicant_name') or doc.applicant }}
Offer Number{{ doc.offer_number or doc.name }}
Acceptance Date{{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.response_date or doc.offer_date) }}
Department{{ doc.department }}
Supervisor{{ doc.supervisor }}

I accept the internship offer under the stated terms and conditions.



_____________________
Intern Signature
name: Internship Acceptance Letter

html:
Certificate of Completion

This certifies that

{{ doc.intern_name }}

has successfully completed an internship with the Kenya Red Cross Society.

Department{{ doc.department }}
Supervisor{{ doc.supervisor }}
Internship Period{{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.start_date) }} - {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.end_date) }}


____________________
HR Manager
name: Internship Completion Certificate

html:
Exit Clearance Form

Intern{{ doc.intern }}
Supervisor{{ doc.supervisor }}
Status{{ doc.status }}

Clearance Checklist

ItemStatus
Department Clearance{{ 'Yes' if doc.department_clearance else 'No' }}
HR Clearance{{ 'Yes' if doc.hr_clearance else 'No' }}
ICT Clearance{{ 'Yes' if doc.ict_clearance else 'No' }}
Assets Returned{{ 'Yes' if doc.assets_returned else 'No' }}
Exit Interview Completed{{ 'Yes' if doc.exit_interview_completed else 'No' }}
name: Exit Clearance Form
